allow: Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'ls /var/www/Ensotek/ && echo "---ENSOTEK_COM_TR---" && ls /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---PM2---" && pm2 list 2>/dev/null | grep -E "ensotek|kompozit|kuhlturm" || pm2 list')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr && echo "---GIT STATUS---" && git status --short && echo "---BRANCH---" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && echo "---LOG---" && git log --oneline -3 && echo "---REMOTE---" && git remote -v && echo "---ENV BACKEND---" && ls -la backend/.env* 2>/dev/null && echo "---ENV FRONTEND---" && ls -la frontend/.env* 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/backend && grep -E "db:seed|\\"build\\"|\\"start\\"" package.json | head -10 && echo "---SEED INDEX ARGS---" && grep -n "only\\|no-drop\\|drop" src/db/seed/index.ts | head -15')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/backend && ls src/db/seed/sql/ | head -20 && echo "---ADMIN SQL---" && grep -l "ADMIN_EMAIL\\|ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH\\|users\\|admin" src/db/seed/sql/*.sql 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr && cat frontend/ecosystem.config.cjs 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "---BE ECO---" && cat backend/ecosystem.config.cjs 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "---ADMIN ECO---" && cat admin_panel/ecosystem.config.cjs 2>/dev/null | head -30')
Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr && git pull origin main 2>&1 | tail -15')
Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/frontend && bun run build 2>&1 | tail -25')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u ensotek -pTemizlik123 ensotek_com_tr_db -e "SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE role = '\\''admin'\\'' OR id = '\\''ens0tr01-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'\\'';" 2>&1 | tail -10')
Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'cd /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/frontend && bun run build 2>&1 | tail -40')
Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'ls /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/frontend/.next/lock 2>&1 && ps aux | grep -E "next-build|next build" | grep -v grep')

Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'until ! pgrep -f "next build" >/dev/null; do sleep 5; done; echo "BUILD DONE"; ls -la /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/frontend/.next/BUILD_ID 2>&1; ls /var/www/Ensotek/ensotek_com_tr/frontend/.next/server/app/\\[locale\\]/offer 2>&1')
Bash(ssh vps-Ensotek 'pgrep -f "next build" >/dev/null && echo "RUNNING \(PID: $\(pgrep -f "next build"\)\)" || echo "FINISHED"')
